set -eu; printf 'layers_bytes '; du -sb /eos/layer-stack/layers | awk '{print $1}'; printf 'staging_entries '; find /eos/layer-stack/staging -mindepth 1 2>/dev/null | wc -l; printf 'remount_residue '; find /eos -name '.remount-*' -o -name 'remount-*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l; printf 'layer_dirs '; find /eos/layer-stack/layers -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d -printf '%f,'; printf '\n'; printf 'free_bytes '; df -B1 /eos/layer-stack | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'

set -eu; printf 'layers_bytes '; du -sb /eos/layer-stack/layers | awk '{print $1}'; printf 'staging_entries '; find /eos/layer-stack/staging -mindepth 1 2>/dev/null | wc -l; printf 'remount_residue '; find /eos -name '.remount-*' -o -name 'remount-*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l; printf 'layer_dirs '; find /eos/layer-stack/layers -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d -printf '%f,'; printf '\n'; printf 'free_bytes '; df -B1 /eos/layer-stack | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'
stdout:
layers_bytes 8390656
staging_entries 0
remount_residue 4
layer_dirs L000004-00000009,S000005-00000012,
free_bytes 120555646976

cmd: test "$(wc -c < data/large-blob.txt)" = "8388608" && cat data/large-tail.txt >/dev/null && echo ok
